description: Use this API to tabulate owner totals by owner. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ownr(sid, all)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid owner subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. owner subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All owners or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only owners in owner subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
